name: Lenny Kravitz
abstract: Leonard Albert Kravitz (born May 26, 1964) is an American singer, musician, songwriter, record producer, and actor. His debut album Let Love Rule (1989) was characterized by a blend of rock, funk, reggae, hard rock, soul, and R&B, along with his subsequent releases.

concerts.label: Rainforest Foundation Benefit Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Gerald Wilson
about_quotes.doc_title: Gerald Wilson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Phoebe Jacobs and Jackie Harris
about_quotes.evidence: The transcript mentions Lenny Kravitz only in the context of Troy 'Trombone' Andrews going out with him. The interviewee does not mention any personal interaction or relationship with Lenny Kravitz.
about_quotes.doc_title: Phoebe Jacobs and Jackie Harris interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rome, New York, August 21, 2006
